label: 1568 CE
era_summary: Year 1568 (MDLXVIII) was a leap year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1568 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1568: Moluccas-Portugal (aided by Spain), 1564-69; Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Netherlands-Spain, 1566-68.
